items.title: Transportation
items.desc: All our activities include roundtrip transportation.

items.title: Availability
items.desc: Our park activities are available the 365 days of the year.

items.title: Schedule
items.desc: All our park tours have 2 schedules. In the morning and in the afternoon.
items.badge: Except Super Combo & Puerto Morelos Experience

items.title: Family Friendly
items.desc: All activities can be done by +4 age children.

items.q: What type of footwear do I need for ATVs?
items.a: The park activities are very intense, so it is best to bring comfortable clothes and shoes, as well as a swimsuit. If you have water shoes, it will be ideal since you will be in constant contact with water and mud. If you do not have them, you can find the appropriate accessories in our preparation zone.

Yes, each passenger must bring their own towel and swimsuit, as well as personal hygiene and care items. If you do not have a towel, you can purchase one in our preparation zone, as well as sunglasses, insect repellent, and other personal care accessories.

items.q: What is the minimum age to participate in the activities at the park?
items.a: All park activities can be done by children from 4 years old and up. The minor must remain under the supervision, companionship, and responsibility of their parents or guardians. If the child is under 4 years old, a family member must stay with them and not participate in the activities.

items.q: What is the minimum age to drive an ATV?
items.a: The minimum age is 16 years old accompanied by an adult on the same ATV. To drive an ATV alone, you must be at least 18 years of age.

items.q: What is the maximum weight for the horseback ride?
items.a: In order to ride our horses, the passenger's weight must not exceed 110 kilograms or 242.5 pounds. If this limit is exceeded, the visitor will not be able to participate in this activity.

items.q: What is the maximum weight to use the ziplines?
items.a: In order to climb and slide on our ziplines, the passenger's weight must not exceed 130 kilograms or 286 pounds. If this limit is exceeded, the visitor will not be able to participate in this activity.

items.q: Who cannot participate in the park activities?
items.a:
All park activities involve physical effort and impact on the human body, so the following individuals CANNOT participate in these activities:
  • Pregnant women.
  • People with recent operations or surgeries (6 months).
  • People with muscle injuries in any part of the body.
  • People with any physical disability that prevents them from performing the activities.
Due to international safety standards, to guarantee the safety of our visitors during the park activities, the use of cameras or cell phones is not allowed.

items.q: What days does the park close?
items.a: The park only suspends its operations and remains closed on January 1st and December 25th.

items.q: Does the park close when it rains?
items.a: Our park remains open in regular weather conditions of the Mexican Caribbean, such as torrential rain and spontaneous wind. However, the park may suspend its operations and close in the event of natural disasters such as thunderstorms and hurricanes.
Yes, all of our activities and tours include round-trip transportation from your hotel or meeting point.

items.q: Where will the transportation pick me up?
items.a: Regularly, our vehicles pick up and return passengers at the hotel where they are staying. There can be exceptions for vacation rentals or hotels that do not allow access. In these cases, a nearby meeting point is assigned. To confirm this, please contact customer service to determine the corresponding meeting point.

items.q: What type of transportation will pick me up?
items.a: Our units are unmistakable thanks to their wrapping and jaguar skin colors, in addition to images and our own registered trademark logo. We have different models of vans or minivans properly labeled for easy identification.

items.q: How can I identify the transportation driver?
items.a: If for any reason you have doubts about who is the person officially authorized by the company to pick up a passenger, you can contact the customer service area and request the operator's name, as well as the estimated time of arrival at your hotel or meeting point.

items.q: What happens if I miss the transportation?
items.a: If for any reason the passenger is delayed, cannot find the lobby, the meeting point, or cannot reach the pickup location on time, they will miss the transportation. In this case, they will have to reach the park by their own means, either by hiring another private transportation or by requesting a taxi service to reach the park.

items.q: What drinks are included in the park?
items.a: In our park we have natural water dispensers, however, it does not include flavored or bottled drinks; these can be purchased at an extra cost.

bestDay.title: Affiliate Portal: Best Day
bestDay.resourcesSubtitle: Promotional and technical material customized for Best Day brand standards.
bestDay.contactSubtitle: Need custom materials, group rates, or immediate assistance?
bestDay.formSuccess: Request sent successfully! We will get in touch with you soon.
bestDay.policyInfo: Best Day reservations must be made at least 12 hours in advance. Free cancellations up to 24 hours prior to the tour. Confidential net rates apply according to the current agreement.

hotelBeds.title: Affiliate Portal: Hotel Beds
hotelBeds.resourcesSubtitle: API documentation, product ID mappings, and graphic materials for global distribution.
hotelBeds.contactSubtitle: Need support with product mapping, API errors, or dynamic agreements?
hotelBeds.formSuccess: Query sent successfully! The technical support team will contact you.
hotelBeds.policyInfo: All API integrations must comply with real-time confirmation protocols. Cancellations are governed by the dynamic agreements set within the API. In case of discrepancy, contact your account manager.

jopaNauticos.title: Affiliate Portal: Jopa Nauticos
jopaNauticos.resourcesSubtitle: Snorkeling tour sheets, private yacht brochures, and high-resolution photo galleries.
jopaNauticos.contactSubtitle: Need a quote for a private group, weather verification, or coordination of a special tour?
jopaNauticos.formSuccess: Message sent successfully! We will get in touch immediately.
jopaNauticos.policyInfo: All water activities are subject to the weather conditions of Puerto Morelos port. If the port is closed by the Port Captaincy, tours will be rescheduled at no cost or refunded at 100%.

tropicalIncentives.title: DMC Portal: Tropical Incentives
tropicalIncentives.resourcesSubtitle: Group fact sheets, private transportation logistics, and co-branded presentations.
tropicalIncentives.contactSubtitle: Planning a corporate event or a group of over 20 passengers? Request a custom quote.
tropicalIncentives.formSuccess: Request received! Our groups department will reply in less than 24 hours.
tropicalIncentives.policyInfo: Groups require a 30% deposit to guarantee transport and guide blocks. Group cancellations allowed up to 15 days prior without penalty. Rates are dynamic based on the number of participants.

wildPass.title: Affiliate Portal: Wild Pass
wildPass.resourcesSubtitle: Youth adventure flyers, downloadable posters for sales points, and short video clips.
wildPass.contactSubtitle: Need materials for your hostel, to organize a brand activation, or physical promo items?
wildPass.formSuccess: Request sent! We will get in touch with you shortly to coordinate.
wildPass.policyInfo: Wild Pass commissions are calculated monthly and settled within the first 5 business days. It is mandatory to register the code WP-WILD-2026 on each reservation to guarantee commission attribution.
